detaileddescription.para: Pebble OS provides you with a set of APIs for handling event services, like accelerometer taps, app focus for interactivity, battery states, Bluetooth connections, and tick timers to call when a time component has changed. You use event services to be notified, for example, when something happens on Pebble, like losing the connection to the phone or when a notification covers the screen and requires your Pebble game to pause.
